title: The House Without a Key
writer: Earl Derr Biggers, Frank Leon Smith
actors: Allene Ray, Walter Miller, E.H. Calvert
plot: A Pathe serial in ten chapters of two-reels each: Dan Winterslip, a wealthy man in Honolulu, has not spoken to his brother, who owns a hotel next to Winterslip's estate, in over twenty years. Minerva, sister to the estranged broth...
